_comment: Brent crude (Europe Brent Spot Price FOB) converted to GBP. USD series sourced from EIA daily table at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/rbrted.htm (US federal public-domain). GBP/USD spot is the BoE 4pm daily fix (XUDLUSS). Refreshed weekly by the editorial pipeline. AUDIT 2026-04-29: refreshed forwards from 2026-04-17 ($98.63 / 72.68 GBP) to 2026-04-20 ($103.39 / 76.46 GBP), the most recent EIA RBRTE + BoE XUDLUSS pair sourced during the 2026-04-27 backfill run (apps/ingest/src/pipelines/backfill.ts). Backfill data is the highest-fidelity public source we have, and the value matches what the live SQL selector now surfaces from D1 — so the fixture and the served row tell the same story regardless of which path the adapter takes. AUDIT 2026-04-27: previous fixture carried 83.12 USD / 1.266 FX / 65.65 GBP for 2026-04-17 — those numbers do not match the EIA+BoE prints for that date. The April 2026 Iran-conflict-driven Brent spike (peak $138.21 on 2026-04-07, easing to $98.63 by 2026-04-17) was missing from the fixture entirely. Corrected against EIA RBRTE + BoE XUDLUSS spot fixings.
